name: banyan
description: A hierarchical, self-compounding agent harness ported to OpenAI Codex. Lead agents own whole subtrees and spawn their own children via multi_agent_v1; coordination happens through a file-based run ledger; lessons are harvested at the leaves and consolidated by a background curator.

agents.note: Codex native plugin install registers skills only. Run the agent-install step above to register the 54 agent definitions into <CODEX_HOME>/agents/, or delegating skills report missing agents (see docs/codex-install.md).

unverified: Exact native marketplace manifest filename and schema are confirm-by against the current Codex skills/marketplace docs; see docs/codex-install.md.
